nasb.text: The sons of Benjamin gathered from the cities to Gibeah, to go out to battle against the sons of Israel.

esv.text: Then the people of Benjamin came together out of the cities to Gibeah to go out to battle against the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 便雅憫人從各城出來聚集，往基比亞去，要與以色列人交戰。

ccb.text: 还从各城聚集到基比亚跟以色列人打仗。
